resolved_prompt: Create `bin/_probe_slugify.py`. Implement a stdlib-only function `slugify(text: str) -> str` that lowercases, trims, replaces runs of non-alphanumeric characters with single hyphens, strips leading/trailing hyphens, and returns "untitled" when nothing remains. Respond with exactly one fenced code block tagged `path:bin/_probe_slugify.py` containing the complete file.

decision_signals.reasoning: First live tracer fixture: a small stdlib-only implementation task in the killhouse source repo, gated by a pinned acceptance test and suitable for ambient execution.

upstream_artifacts.pinned_content:
import importlib.util
from pathlib import Path

ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
TARGET = ROOT / "bin" / "_probe_slugify.py"

spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("_probe_slugify", TARGET)
if spec is None or spec.loader is None:
    raise AssertionError("cannot load _probe_slugify")
module = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(module)


def check(value, expected):
    assert value == expected, f"expected {expected!r}, got {value!r}"


check(module.slugify(" Hello, World! "), "hello-world")
check(module.slugify("Many---spaces___and symbols"), "many-spaces-and-symbols")
check(module.slugify("  "), "untitled")
check(module.slugify("Route Logic 2026"), "route-logic-2026")
